calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Apr-26-2004 Assigned To Trial Court

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Apr-26-2004 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This Cause came as assigned from the Presiding Judge Master Calendar for Court Trial/Prove-Up.
Commissioner Sue M. Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Romy Barulich.
Todd Bothbard, Esq., for Plaintiff: Olympic View Realty, LLC,
No appearance by the Defendants: Robert Rautha and Chris Tautha.
09:45 am. - Plaintiff's witness: Margarita Gonzalez, the property manager, was sworn and direct examined by counsel.
The Court having heard the testimony, grants judgment as follows:
Judgment in favor of plaintiff and against defendants for restitution and possession of the premises at: 403 Vidal Dr., San Francisco, CA.
Rent and Damages in the total sum of $3,444.00
Attorney's Fees of $750.00
Costs of $203.30
For the total of $4,397.30
Rental agreement declared forfeited.
Judgment signed in open court.
